description: Composition Blue track pants made of 95% cotton and 5% lycra, has an elasticated waistband that has a drawstring on the inside, pink piping below the waistband and embroidered brand name on the left leg Fit Comfort Wash care Normal wash cold inside out at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not soak, bleach or dry clean Line dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Chosen from the adidas fitness and sportswear range for women, these track pants add style to your look while you focus on performance. Ideal for all your fitness, Sports training and competition needs, these cotton-lycra pants allow easy movement and does not lose shape even after years of wear. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'9" and waist 26"
